subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! God willing, mayest thou be blessed through divine bounties. Thy mention hath been in the Most Great Prison - this is from the grace of thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی انشاء الله بعنایت الهی فائز باشی ذکرت در سجن اعظم بوده هذا من فضل ربک
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
